name: The Best-Pumpkin Pie Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan.
3. Combine pumpkin, evaporated milk, eggs, sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and salt in a large bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle dry cake mix evenly over the pumpkin mixture.
6. Top with chopped pecans and drizzle with melted butter.
7. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
9. Serve with whipped topping.
Makes 16 to 20 servings.
